testcase.name: history.list > AC-2: list all — findMany called with accountId + orderBy createdAt desc
history.list > AC-2: filter by agentMode — where includes agentMode
history.list > AC-2: filter by agentId
history.list > AC-2: filter by sourceType
history.list > AC-2: dateRange=last_7d → createdAt gte filter added
history.list > AC-2: pagination — take=limit skip=offset passed through
history.list > AC-12: limit > 100 → zod BAD_REQUEST
history.detail > AC-3: detail — findFirst with id + accountId
history.detail > AC-13: detail not found → NOT_FOUND
history.list US-013 > US-013 AC-8 (1): list filter agentMode=production → findMany includes production filter
history.list US-013 > US-013 AC-8 (2): list filter agentMode=acquisition(video) → VideoAgent rows returned
history.detail US-013 > US-013 AC-8 (3): storyboard detail → scenes array returned
history.detail US-013 > US-013 AC-8 (4): detail join Asset → sceneImageUrl from Asset.publicUrl
history.detail US-013 > US-013 AC-8 (5): cross-account detail → NOT_FOUND (accountId double-layer guard)
history.delete > AC-4: delete — deleteMany with id + accountId → { ok: true }
history.delete > AC-13: delete cross-account blocked by explicit accountId where
history.stats > AC-10: stats — costLog.count called with accountId (total + fail)
history.stats > AC-10: stats — failureRate = failCount / totalCalls
history.stats > AC-10: stats — failureRate = 0 when totalCalls = 0
history.stats > AC-10: stats — topTools from groupBy agentId (5 entries)
history.stats > AC-10: stats — dailyTrend groups createdAt by date key
history.stats > AC-10: stats — durationHistogram buckets <1s/1-3s/3-10s/10-30s/>30s
history.stats > AC-10: stats — modelDistribution from groupBy modelUsed
history.stats > AC-10: stats — dateRange=today applies createdAt ≥ midnight filter
history.stats > AC-10: stats — tools filter maps slugs to agentId IN list
history.list tools filter (AC-7) > list with tools=["copywriting"] → where.agentId.in includes CopywritingAgent
history.list tools filter (AC-7) > list with tools=["aiVideo","videoProduction"] → agentId.in includes VideoAgent
history.list tools filter (AC-7) > list without tools → no agentId.in filter (backward compat)
history.list tools filter (AC-7) > list dateRange=today → createdAt ≥ midnight filter
View switching (AC-1 + AC-2 + AC-3) > History.tsx has 200+ lines
View switching (AC-1 + AC-2 + AC-3) > timeline view: data-testid="history-timeline"
View switching (AC-1 + AC-2 + AC-3) > dashboard view: data-testid="history-dashboard"
View switching (AC-1 + AC-2 + AC-3) > view toggle buttons: view-timeline-btn + view-dashboard-btn + view-toggle
URL state (AC-4 + AC-5 + AC-6) > uses useSearchParams for URL state
URL state (AC-4 + AC-5 + AC-6) > URL ?view param determines timeline|dashboard
URL state (AC-4 + AC-5 + AC-6) > URL ?tools param for multi-tool filter (AC-5)
URL state (AC-4 + AC-5 + AC-6) > URL ?dateRange param: today/week/month/all (AC-6)
Timeline day grouping (AC-2) > groupByDay function exists and groups by day key
Timeline day grouping (AC-2) > timeline shows tool icon + name + input summary + output summary + time + actions
Timeline day grouping (AC-2) > action buttons: view detail (eye), restore (refresh), delete (trash)
Dashboard KPI + charts (AC-3) > 4 charts: daily-trend + tool-distribution + duration-histogram + model-distribution
Dashboard KPI + charts (AC-3) > uses recharts: LineChart + PieChart + BarChart + ResponsiveContainer
Dashboard KPI + charts (AC-3) > dashboard calls trpc.history.stats.useQuery with dateRange + tools
Restore and re-run (AC-8) > getToolRestoreUrl function returns URL with topic + restored params
Restore and re-run (AC-8) > restore navigates to tool page via useNavigate
Restore and re-run (AC-8) > mode mappings cover free/boom/structural/viral/production/storyboard/acquisition
Detail Drawer (AC-9) > HistoryDetailDrawer component with data-testid="history-detail-drawer"
Detail Drawer (AC-9) > drawer shows full content (not truncated)
Detail Drawer (AC-9) > drawer uses Sheet component
Backend stats procedure (AC-10) > history.ts exports historyRouter with stats procedure
Backend stats procedure (AC-10) > stats queries cost_log via prisma.costLog.count/aggregate/groupBy/findMany
Backend stats procedure (AC-10) > toolsToAgentIds maps tool slugs to agent IDs
14-tool filter chips (AC-5) > TOOL_DEFS has 14+ tool entries
14-tool filter chips (AC-5) > tool slugs include all major tools
